content.text: How can I programmatically generate Google Analytics tracking snippets that support varying configurations like cross-domain linking?
If I provide an account but don't enable DJFRONTEND_GA_SETDOMAINNAME, what exact tracking parameters will be used?
The function defaults to a simpler setup when domain settings are disabled. It creates the GA object and sends a 'pageview' using only the provided `account` ID.
That clears up how the basic behavior works.
